baseline_note: pass-1 baseline = CRC-guarded union over the bank (== x10_union_probe). The plan's union+late-window baseline was unavailable (x10_late_window results absent when this ran); ladder gains are measured vs union-only and may overlap late-window gains.

ladder_preregistration.ranking: per-carrier RMS wrapped post-decision dphi residual, ema0.6 branch, per section (truth-free)
ladder_preregistration.sets: singletons/pairs/triples from the 4 worst-ranked carriers (14 sets), fewest-erasures-first
ladder_preregistration.branches: 4 bank members with fewest pass-1 failures (ties: bank order)
ladder_preregistration.feasibility: skip set if n_erased > rs_n - rs_k

carrier_ranking.metric: RMS wrapped post-decision dphi residual (deg), ema0.6 branch

baseline_clarification.note: x10_late_window results did not exist when this experiment ran (parallel execution); this pipeline's pre-registered pass-1 is the union bank. The late-window candidate independently drove the same m6/m7 residuals to 0, so the two mechanisms are redundant rescue paths for the same 14 codewords on this capture; each cross-confirms the other (both misc=0 vs truth).

trial_budget.tape7_tape4_note: no per-codeword CRC tables in master7/master4 manifests; union/ladder cannot accept anything there (zero false-accept channel by construction)

gate.record_convention_caveat: per-codeword CRC32 acceptance uses the manifest sidecar table (sec['crc32_codewords']), i.e. truth-derived receiver-side information; only the whole-payload CRC32 is in-stream. All record claims from this receiver inherit that sidecar caveat, same convention as the standing 2572 record.
gate.verdict: FULL PASS (m7 residual -> 0, 2896 banked orig-exact; m6 also -> 0 at 2809) under the union pass-1 baseline; vs the parallel union+late-window baseline the ladder adds 0 (that baseline already saturated at 0 residual).
